sentence: O tempo não está bom hoje de tarde.
ipa: u ˈtẽpu ˈnɐ̃w̃ ɛˈhta ˈbõ ˈoʒi di ˈtaɾdi
gloss_en: The weather is not good this afternoon.
notes: Diagnostic coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] before a consonant in 'está'->[ɛˈhta] per cardoso_etal2014; nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'não' and nasal [õ] in 'bom' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Estas festas custam quarenta reais.
ipa: ˈehtas ˈfehtas ˈkuhtɐ̃w̃ kwaˈɾẽtɐ ʁɛˈajs
gloss_en: These parties cost forty reais.
notes: Coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'estas'/'festas'/'custam'->[ˈehtas ˈfehtas ˈkuhtɐ̃] per cardoso_etal2014; word-final /S/ kept [s] in 'reais' and strong onset /r/->[ʁ] per silva2002.

sentence: A consulta é amanhã às onze horas.
ipa: ɐ kõˈsuwtɐ ˈɛ amaˈɲɐ̃ as ˈõzi ˈoɾas
gloss_en: The appointment is tomorrow at eleven.
notes: Word-final /S/ kept [s] in 'às'/'horas' (aspiration is pre-consonantal) per cardoso_etal2014; vocalised coda /l/->[w] in 'consulta' and palatal [ɲ] in 'amanhã' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Meu tio mora numa casa bonita.
ipa: ˈmew ˈt͡ʃiu ˈmɔɾɐ ˈnumɐ ˈkazɐ bɔˈnitɐ
gloss_en: My uncle lives in a nice house.
notes: Palatal africada /t/+/i/->[t͡ʃ] in 'tio' (Fortaleza prestige norm retains palatalisation) per cardoso_etal2014; open pretonic /o/->[ɔ] in 'bonita' per cardoso_etal2014.

sentence: Vira ali na esquina e desce a ladeira.
ipa: ˈviɾɐ aˈli nɐ ɛˈhkinɐ i ˈdehs̺i ɐ laˈdejɾɐ
gloss_en: Turn there at the corner and go down the slope.
notes: Coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'esquina'->[ɛˈhkinɐ] and 'desce'->[ˈdehs̺i] per cardoso_etal2014; 'ei' in 'ladeira' and 'desce a' liaison per callou_leite2001.

sentence: A carne de sol estava deliciosa.
ipa: ɐ ˈkaɾni di ˈsɔw ɛˈhtavɐ dɛlis̺iˈozɐ
gloss_en: The sun-dried beef was delicious.
notes: Coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'estava'->[ɛˈhtavɐ] per cardoso_etal2014; vocalised coda /l/->[w] in 'sol' and open pretonic /e/->[ɛ] in 'deliciosa' per silva2002.

sentence: Onde é que a gente espera o ônibus?
ipa: ˈõdi ˈɛ ki ɐ ˈʒẽti ɛˈhpɛɾɐ u ˈonibus
gloss_en: Where do we catch the bus?
notes: Coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'espera'->[ɛˈhpeɾɐ] per cardoso_etal2014; word-final [s] in 'ônibus', open mid [ɛ] in 'é' and 'que a'/'gente espera' liaisons per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Quantos parentes você espera hoje?
ipa: kwɐ̃ˈtus paˈɾẽtis vɔˈs̺e ɛˈhpɛɾɐ ˈoʒi
gloss_en: How many relatives are you expecting today?
notes: Coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'espera' and word-final [s] in 'quantos'/'parentes' per cardoso_etal2014; open pretonic /o/->[ɔ] in 'você', /e/->[ɛ] in 'espera' per cardoso_etal2014.

sentence: Se eu pudesse, comprava aquela rede.
ipa: si ˈew puˈdesi kõˈpɾavɐ aˈkelɐ ˈʁedi
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that hammock.
notes: Conditional-imperfect frame; strong onset /r/->[ʁ] in 'rede' per silva2002; 'se eu' liaison and open mid [ɛ] in 'aquela' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: A gente gosta de tapioca com manteiga.
ipa: ɐ ˈʒẽti ˈɡohtɐ di tapiˈokɐ kʊ̃ mɐ̃ˈtejɡɐ
gloss_en: We like tapioca with butter.
notes: Coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'gosta'->[ˈɡohtɐ] per cardoso_etal2014; 'ei' in 'manteiga', open pretonic /o/->[ɔ] in 'tapioca' and 'gente gosta' liaison per silva2002.

sentence: Amanhã a tia viaja até Fortaleza de dia.
ipa: amaˈɲɐ̃ ɐ ˈt͡ʃiɐ viˈaʒɐ aˈtɛ fɔɾtaˈlezɐ di ˈd͡ʒiɐ
gloss_en: Tomorrow the aunt travels to Fortaleza by day.
notes: Palatal africadas /t,d/+/i/->[t͡ʃ,d͡ʒ] in 'tia'/'de dia' per cardoso_etal2014; palatal [ɲ] in 'amanhã', 'amanhã a' liaison and open mid [ɛ] in 'até' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Me liga assim que você chegar em casa.
ipa: mi ˈliɡɐ aˈsĩ ki vɔˈs̺e ʃɛˈɡaɾ ɪ̃ ˈkazɐ
gloss_en: Call me as soon as you get home.
notes: Open pretonic /o/->[ɔ] in 'você' and /e/->[ɛ] in 'chegar' per cardoso_etal2014; 'liga assim' liaison and nasal [ẽ] in 'em' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Boa tarde, então como é que tu tá passando?
ipa: ˈboɐ ˈtaɾdi ẽˈtɐ̃w̃ ˈkomu ˈɛ ki ˈtu ˈta paˈsɐ̃du
gloss_en: Good afternoon, so how have you been?
notes: Greeting register; nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'então' and nasal [ɐ̃] in 'passando' per mateus_dandrade2000; open mid [ɛ] in 'é' per cardoso_etal2014.

sentence: Mais vale um pássaro na mão do que dois voando.
ipa: ˈmajs ˈvali ˈũ ˈpasaɾu nɐ ˈmɐ̃w̃ du ki ˈdojs vɔˈɐ̃du
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two flying away.
notes: Proverb; word-final /S/ kept [s] in 'mais'/'dois' per cardoso_etal2014; nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'mão' and open pretonic /o/->[ɔ] in 'voando' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: O carro do vovô ainda corre na estrada.
ipa: u ˈkaʁu du vɔˈvo ˈaj̃dɐ ˈkɔʁi nɐ ɛˈhtɾadɐ
gloss_en: Grandpa's car still runs on the road.
notes: Strong onset /r/ and /rr/->[ʁ] in 'carro'/'corre' per silva2002; coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'estrada' and open pretonic /o/->[ɔ] in 'vovô' per cardoso_etal2014.

sentence: Aquele menino bonito estuda o dia inteiro.
ipa: aˈkeli mɛˈninu bɔˈnitu ɛˈhtudɐ u ˈd͡ʒiɐ ĩˈtejɾu
gloss_en: That handsome boy studies all day long.
notes: Open pretonic /e/->[ɛ] in 'menino' and /o/->[ɔ] in 'bonito' per cardoso_etal2014; coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'estuda', palatal africada /d/+/i/->[d͡ʒ] in 'dia' and 'ei' in 'inteiro' per cardoso_etal2014.

sentence: O mundo inteiro gosta desse forró.
ipa: u ˈmũdu ĩˈtejɾu ˈɡohtɐ ˈdesi fɔˈʁɔ
gloss_en: The whole world likes this forró.
notes: Coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'gosta'->[ˈɡohtɐ] and strong /rr/->[ʁ] in 'forró' per cardoso_etal2014; 'ei' in 'inteiro' and nasal [ũ] in 'mundo' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: A mulher velha espalha milho no quintal.
ipa: ɐ muˈʎeɾ ˈveʎɐ ɛˈhpaʎɐ ˈmiʎu nu kĩˈtaw
gloss_en: The old woman scatters corn in the yard.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'velha'/'espalha'/'milho' per mateus_dandrade2000; coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'espalha', open pretonic /e/->[ɛ] and vocalised coda /l/->[w] in 'quintal' per cardoso_etal2014.

sentence: O sol brilha por cima daquele coqueiro azul.
ipa: u ˈsɔw ˈbɾiʎɐ pʊɾ ˈs̺imɐ daˈkeli kɔˈkejɾu aˈzuw
gloss_en: The sun shines over that blue coconut tree.
notes: Vocalised coda /l/->[w] in 'sol'/'azul' per silva2002; palatal [ʎ] in 'brilha', 'ei' in 'coqueiro' and open pretonic /o/->[ɔ] per cardoso_etal2014.

sentence: As costas doem depois de tanta caminhada.
ipa: as ˈkohtas ˈdoɪ̃ dɛˈpojs di ˈtɐ̃tɐ kamiˈɲadɐ
gloss_en: My back aches after so much walking.
notes: Diagnostic coda /S/ aspiration ->[h] in 'costas'->[ˈkohtas] per cardoso_etal2014; palatal [ɲ] in 'caminhada', nasal [õ] in 'costas' and 'costas doem' as a sandhi site per mateus_dandrade2000.
